claims.claim: The Chinese private equity market has experienced a remarkable growth trajectory over the past decade, with AUM expanding from approximately $500 billion in 2015 to over $1.5 trillion in 2024

claims.location_ref: Location -> [China Private Equity Market Remains Large but Faces Headwinds from Regulation and Economy] | Para 1 | "The decline" -> "LP base"

claims.claim: The number of funds closed in 2024 is expected to be 30% lower than in 2021
